records.ety: [Prob. of Russ. goluishka bare of possessions, offspring, etc., fr. golui naked.]

defs: A young male fur seal, esp. one from three to six years old; -- called also bachelor, because prevented from breeding by the older full-grown males.
quotes: But he'll lie down on the killing grounds where the holluschickie go.
notes: ☞ The holluschickie are the seals that may legally be killed for their skins.
